---
title: "CorrigeDataCamp"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())

unzip("2025-26 Tractament de les dades Gr.A-T (36423)-Tarea Intermediate R(Datacamp)-3281647.zip",
      exdir = "entregas_descomprimidas")
```

```{r}
ficheros <- list.files("entregas_descomprimidas", pattern = "\\.txt$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}

```
